questions.question: Write a Python program to find synonyms and antonyms of the word 'active' using WordNet. Use the WordNetLemmatizer to normalize the words. What will be the output of the program?
questions.hint: Use the WordNetLemmatizer to normalize the words. Note that you need to install the nltk library and download the wordnet corpus.

questions.question: How do you plan to compare the similarity between the synonyms and antonyms of the word 'active' using WordNet in your Python program?
questions.hint: You can use the similarity scores provided by WordNetLemmatizer to compare the similarity between the synonyms and antonyms of the word 'active'.

questions.question: Can you explain the importance of using WordNet to find synonyms and antonyms of the word 'active' in your Python program?
questions.hint: WordNet provides a vast lexical database of English words. It is useful for finding synonyms and antonyms of a given word.
